# X Flow Teller

> A Chrome extension that reads your X (Twitter) feed aloud — 35 languages with native voices, 100% local, no cloud API.

## What it does

X Flow Teller reads posts on X (formerly Twitter) out loud, one by one, using your browser's built-in text-to-speech engine. It auto-detects the language of each post and selects the appropriate native voice. When visible posts run out, the page scrolls automatically to load more.

## Supported languages (35)

English, Turkish, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, Polish, Czech, Romanian, Hungarian, Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Finnish, Russian, Ukrainian, Serbian, Greek, Arabic, Hebrew, Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Gujarati, Thai, Vietnamese, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Chinese. All other languages are read with an English voice.

## How it works

1. Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store.
2. Open X (x.com or twitter.com).
3. A floating control panel appears at the bottom-right.
4. Press Play — posts are read aloud while the page scrolls automatically.

## Pricing

- Free tier: 10 reads per day, no sign-up required.
- Lifetime license: $5 one-time payment for unlimited reads.

## Privacy

- No data leaves your browser. All speech synthesis runs locally.
- No analytics, tracking, or third-party scripts.
- License keys are validated via Polar.sh; no personal data is transmitted.

## Links

- Website: https://xflowteller.com
- Privacy Policy: https://xflowteller.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://xflowteller.com/terms
